name: sports-league-management-system
description: Sports League Management System - root workspace for security tooling

scripts.security:audit:all: for dir in mobile web appwrite/functions/save-push-token appwrite/functions/send-push .; do echo "\n--- Auditing $dir ---"; (cd "$dir" && [ -f package.json ] && npm audit --audit-level=high) || true; done
scripts.security:all: npm run security:audit:all && npm run security:semgrep && npm run security:gitleaks
